problem: Who requested the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) implement a 900 sq mi (2,300 km2) temporary flight restriction zone over the operations areas of the Deepwater Horizon?

response.answer: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) implemented a 900 sq mi (2,300 km2) temporary flight restriction zone over the operations areas of the Deepwater Horizon oil spill. The request to implement this restriction came from the U.S. Coast Guard, who was the On Scene Coordinator for the Deepwater Horizon Oil Spill response. The Coast Guard coordinated with the FAA to establish and enforce the temporary flight restriction to ensure safety and security over the operations area.

problem: What player scored all the conversions for Spain in the rugby match between Spain and Romania that was part of the 2022 Rugby Europe Championship on February 27, 2022?

response.answer: The player who scored all the conversions for Spain in the rugby match between Spain and Romania on February 27, 2022, as part of the 2022 Rugby Europe Championship, was Diego Fortuny.
search_results: Match report Spain 38 - 21 Romania, 27/02/2022 - Rugby Europe Championship. The match report includes lineups, points, stats including scoring details. The player who scored all the conversions for Spain in this match was Diego Fortuny.
